# AdShop

> Creative-agency showroom for FallHub. Sovereign AI-first operating system configured for ad firms, brand studios, and freelance strategists. Multi-brand voice kernel (one AI, N distinct client voices). Deliverable chasing, milestone invoicing, campaign timelines. Ships with FallReach for outbound. Published by AI-Native Solutions. MIT. ◊·κ=1.

## What it is

AdShop is a vertical showroom pointing at:
- FallHub's ad-firm vertical template
- FallForge's concierge installer
- The agency module stack (FallReach, FallCRM Elite, FallAccount, Cassie Oracle, Botler, FallBrief)

Any creative agency can deploy FallHub with the AdShop configuration and get an AI-first operating system that handles feedback replies, approval chases, milestone invoicing, competitor watches, and brief intake.

## Signature feature: multi-brand voice kernel

AdShop's kernel is a client-portfolio kernel. Each client has its own tone, banned phrases, past reply patterns. When the AI drafts a reply, it grounds in the specific client's kernel. Foo Cosmetics feedback sounds like Foo Cosmetics. Bar Bank sounds like Bar Bank.

Voice learning is continuous — edits to AI drafts feed back into the client's voice profile.

## Modules typically installed on AdShop instances

- FallReach — autonomous multichannel outbound (LinkedIn, email, WhatsApp, Instagram)
- FallCRM Elite — client pipeline with signal-based timelines
- FallAccount — retainer + milestone billing
- Cassie Oracle — competitor watch across all clients
- Botler — in-browser LLM for private brief drafting
- FallBrief — contract clauses, IP transfer, scope-creep wording

- Showroom: https://sjgant80-hub.github.io/adshop/
